Co Pilot Security Marketplace
Version: 4.0.17
Build Name: SERVER ROOT ENTRY LOCK + ACTIVITY FEED
Date: 2026-06-27

Summary:
- Fixes the issue where Bolt kept serving stale /dist/index.html and the visible app badge remained v4.0.13.
- server.cjs now always serves root index.html instead of preferring dist/index.html.
- Root index.html loads script-v417.js with a v4.0.17 cache buster.
- dist/ is still generated fresh for GitHub/static reference, but it is no longer the server entry source.
- Preserves the v4.0.14/v4.0.15/v4.0.16 marketplace activity feed work.
- Platform Admin Marketplace Activity should show guard lifecycle actions including accepted, en route, arrived, checking property, proof uploaded, completed, and report published.

Badge:
v4.0.17 SERVER ROOT ENTRY LOCK + ACTIVITY FEED

SQL:
No real schema change required.
Optional cache refresh:
RUN_AFTER_V417_SERVER_ROOT_ENTRY_LOCK_ACTIVITY_FEED.sql
